## Entities.JournalLibrary.removeJournal() method

Removes a [journal record](./ts-chocolate.entities.journal.anyjournalrecord.md) from the library

**Signature:**

```typescript
removeJournal(journalId: JournalId): Result<AnyJournalRecord>;
```
